name: The Armed Shadow
short_description: Shadows are the most dangerous creatures in the world
detailed_description:
Shadows are the most dangerous creatures in the world. They're fast, they're strong, they have guns! You are a shadowhunter. You have weapons in your arsenal that can destroy a shadow, but that's not enough! You need to move fast and dodge enemy attacks!

Each level has a specific task to destroy the enemy. In some cases, you will have to use only grenades, in others only firearms... There are also different types of enemies, some attacking at close range, others using weapons. Be careful and you will win!

Genre of the game - survival

Game Features:

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Dangerous enemies

  • Interesting gameplay
